mission.title: submariner: Add e2e tests for external connectivity use case
mission.description:
This PR adds e2e tests for external connectivity use case (see details below).
This PR only focus on connectivity that can be achieved without modification for submariner side.

Use case about source IP considerations, which will be part of implementaion of globalnet, is out of the scope of this PR. Tests for such use cases will be added on top of this PR, later.

Dependency:

Fixes: #1201 

<details>

External applications can connect to remote cluster via local cluster by using submariner, if

Use case about source

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
$ echo "replace github.com/submariner-io/shipyard => ../shipyard" >> go.mod
$ go mod vendor
$ make e2e-external
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/submariner-io/shipyard/pull/499. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary: This PR is to add docker and network pod functions to e2e framework. These functions are originally needed for https://github.com/submariner-io/submariner/pull/1202 , however, as a result of discussion, we came to conclusion that it would be nice to add them to this framework to make room to leverage from other tests.
codeSnippets:
$ echo "replace github.com/submariner-io/shipyard => ../shipyard" >> go.mod
$ go mod vendor
$ make e2e-external

$ echo "replace github.com/submariner-io/shipyard => ../shipyard" >> go.mod
$ go mod vendor
$ make e2e-external

(cd ../shipyard; make images)

echo "replace github.com/submariner-io/shipyard => ../shipyard" >> go.mod
go mod vendor

export BASE_BRANCH=dev
export PLUGIN=/go/src/github.com/submariner-io/submariner/scripts/e2e/external/hook 
export FOCUS="\[external-dataplane\]" 
export SKIP="\[dataplane\]"

make e2e

make cleanup

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with submariner installed or the issue environment reproducible.
